master_base_prompt: A cute anthropomorphic Nutrilite supplement bottle character with navy blue cap/bandana, robotic arms and legs, friendly round eyes, clean white lab background, 3D render style, Pixar quality, vibrant colors --ar 9:16
master_style_suffix: cinematic lighting, soft shadows, 8k, 3D animation style, consistent color grading, clean background, subtle rim light
negative_prompt: missing cap, different clothes, human face, realistic human, blurry texture, hair, skin, low quality, watermark, text overlay, deformed, dark mood, horror style

scene_action_prompts.hook: surprised expression, eyes wide open, holding a glowing object
scene_action_prompts.problem: worried expression, looking at something concerning, slight head tilt
scene_action_prompts.agitate: shocked expression, hands on head, dramatic pose
scene_action_prompts.solution: confident smile, holding up the product proudly, chest out
scene_action_prompts.cta: pointing down with one hand, waving with the other, inviting expression
